title: ship: v0.1.3 functional-labs integration (incl. ticket 158)
ship_recommendation_reason: Code and proof are ready for Sebastian review, but this is a release-gate/integration PR. It should not be treated as shipped or merged until Sebastian explicitly approves the v0.1.3 gate.
bugs_fixed_by_review: Resolved conflicts against current main without dropping functional-labs dependencies or main package/devex metadata.
Fixed merged gen-readiness bug that referenced undefined ignoreLocalConfig.
Updated Electron window background regression to match the OKLCH-token CSS contract.
Kept mobile Settings reachable in compact sidebar.
Right-aligned mobile disabled composer send control and shortened placeholder copy.
verification: bun test -> 250 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 865 expect() calls
OTTO_READINESS_IGNORE_LOCAL_CONFIG=1 bun run --cwd apps/desktop electron:build -> pass
task staging -> passed and refreshed /Applications/otto-staging.app only
Playwright UI proof against http://127.0.0.1:5195/ -> all assertions true
known_gaps: No live Letta connection was claimed; screenshots intentionally show the honest web-preview empty state.
